stemHtml: According to the relevant medical requirements, a Class 2 Medical Certificate is valid for...

options.a: 24 months until age of 40, 12 months until age of 60, and 6 months thereafter.
options.b: 24 months until age of 40 and 12 months thereafter.
options.c: 60 months until age of 40, 24 months until age of 50, and 12 months thereafter.
options.d: 60 months until age of 30, 24 months until age of 40, and 12 months thereafter.
